title: Creative Menu Tweaks
description: A mod that improves the creative gui, adding animations, sounds, and data driven item groups.
body:
A mod that improves the creative gui, adding animations, sounds, and data driven item groups.

## Features
- Tabs now make a sound when clicked
- Tabs now raise when hovered
- Icons now follow tabs (Instead of remaining still)
- Tooltips now go above/below tabs instead of following the cursor
- Servers can now have custom, data driven item groups based on datapacks ([Example](https://github.com/Lucifixion/CreativeMenuTweaks/tree/main/src/main/example/datapackexample))
## Preview (Audio is very quiet, it is standard volume ingame)
